title: SAITUAL DISTRICT AIDS PREVENTION AND CONTROL COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1169/2026-2027

Saitual, the 24th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin District AIDS Prevention Control Committee chu District Level Red Ribbon Quiz Competition neih dan tur leh Suraksha Action Plan chungchanga hmalak zel dan tur relin an thu khawm.

He hunah hian District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan Red Ribbon Quiz Competition buatsaih a ni thei tur chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, hmasawnna a thlen ngei a beisei thu a sawi a, chumi atan chuan theih tawp chhuah turin kalkhawmte a sawm nghal a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Red Ribbon Quiz hi Saitual District chhunga Class VIII, Class IX leh Class XI zirlaite tan buatsaih ni se tih rel a ni a, Saitual District chhunga khaw hrang hrangah te, July ni 15 ral hmain Quiz Competition-a tel thei tur thlanna hi neih ni se tih a ni a, DEO Office-lamin mawhphurin an bawhzui ang. July ni 17-ah Deputy Commissioner hova thlir nawn leh ni se tih rel a ni bawk a ni. District Level-a inel tur school sawm (10) thlan chhuahte chu July ni 27-29 chhungin Govt Saitual College ah Quiz Competition chu neih tura rel a ni.

Heng bakah hian Dr Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Member Secretary, DAPCC & Dy. CMO chuan Suraksha chungchanga hmalak tawhnate PPT hmangin sawifiahna a nei a, hmalak zel dan turte sawiho zui a ni bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Member Secretary, DAPCC & Dy. CMO, Dr Rosiamliani Bawitlung, DPM, Saitual, Pu Hmingchungnunga, AHEO, DEO, Saitual, Dr. Emily Malsawmtluangi, CPO, DISHA, Aizawl, Pu J. Lalrempuia, DIS, Aizawl, Dominic VL Fala, D.A, DISHA, Aizawl  te bakah khawtlang hruaitute an tel a ni.

title: Mizoram Youth Commission and Drishti IAS Launch Free UPSC Coaching Programme
content:
200/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th June, 2026:Today, the Mizoram Youth Commission (MYC), in partnership with Drishti IAS coaching institute, officially launched the 'Free UPSC Coaching Programme' at the MYC Auditorium, MINECO, Khatla. The coaching programme was inaugurated by Chief Secretary Shri Khilli Ram Meena as the chief guest.

Addressing the gathering, Chief Secretary Shri Khilli Ram Meena stated that during Union Home Minister Shri Amit Shah's visit to Mizoram in March 2025, he interacted with Mizoram's Civil Society Organisations to discuss various challenges faced by the state. During this interaction, it came to light that the last person from Mizoram to clear the IAS exam did so back in 2014, highlighting the remarkably low number of successful candidates from the state in the All India and Central Civil Services thereafter. Taking this matter seriously and learning from past experiences, state officials held deliberations and discussions, and eventually  designed this Free UPSC Coaching Programme and Drishti IAS, New Delhi—one of the most established and well-equipped coaching institutes in India—was selected to provide the students with the best learning experience and study materials, he said.

Encouraging the students, the Chief Secretary (CS) emphasized that there is no shortcut to success other than hard work. Therefore, he urged the students to work hard with utmost dedication under the guidance of the faculty members, keep pace with their competitors, and to always keep the fire within them alive. Furthermore, the CS stated that the Government of Mizoram stands fully ready to provide any necessary assistance to the students and for the coaching programme. Hence, he advised the students to remain focused and devote themselves wholeheartedly to their preparation without unnecessary distractions.

MYC Chairman Shri Malsawmzuala Ralte, in his address, stated that in Mizoram, the Church, the Government and NGOs are all making efforts to improve the success rate in the Central Civil Services examination. However, he reminded the students that true success can only be achieved through individual determination and hard work.Therefore,  he encouraged the students to make the best use of this opportunity and extended his best wishes for their future endeavours.

Delivering the keynote address, MYC Secretary Smt. V. Lalmuanpuii stated that many Mizo youths often abandon their aspirations of joining the Central Civil Services due to lack of financial resources and other essential requirements. Bearing in mind that investing in youth is the best kind of investment, she stated that this programme was designed under the guidance of the Chief Secretary and LESDE Department officials to open new doors for the youth.

Also speaking on the occasion, Drishti IAS Associate Vice-President Shri Georgi Mathan Ninan remarked that Mizo society upholds admirable values such as 'Tlawmngaihna' (Selflessness/ Community spirit) which are essential traits for civil servants. He assured that Drishti IAS would make every effort to help students from Mizoram to join the Central Services so that they may showcase the admirable values and culture of the Mizo people across different parts of the world.

Today's inaugural function was hosted by MYC faculty member Shri Lalremruata Tuallawt, who also delivered the welcome address and MYC Under Secretary Smt. Lalramdini delivered the vote of thanks. The event was attended by LESDE Secretary Dr. Lalhriatzuali Ralte, LESDE Director Smt. Pinky Zosangpuii, Drishti IAS Chief Content Creator Shri Neel Parmar, Drishti IAS faculty member Shri Vivek Kaushik, and other MYC officials.

OVERVIEW OF THE FREE UPSC COACHING PROGRAMME:

To enable more Mizo youths to qualify the Civil Services Examination conducted by UPSC, the Government of Mizoram through the Mizoram Youth Commission has launched the 12-month free UPSC coaching programme.

For this initiative, a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed with Drishti IAS, New Delhi, one of the most established and well-equipped coaching institutes in India. Following a meticulous screening process, 100 UPSC aspirants were selected and the classes under this coaching programme have been underway since March 24, 2026.

Under this programme, General Studies classes are conducted offline, while six optional subjects—Political Science & International Relations, Geography, Sociology, Anthropology, History, and Public Administration—are taught online. In addition to this, hostel facilities have been arranged for students coming from outside Aizawl.

title: SAITUALAH DISTRICT WATER AND SANITATION MISSION THUKHAWM
content:
1168/2026-2027

Saitual, the 24th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah, District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) chu an chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thu khawm.

He hunah hian SBM- G (Swachh Bharat Mission-Grameen) hnuaia Suangpuilawn khuaa Plastic Waste Management siamte, Swachh Gao, Surakshit Jalvayu (SGSJ), World Environment Day, 1-5 June, 2026 a hman a nih ddante, school hrang hranga tui leh inthiarna awm dante, RPWSS ID siam te, District Water Source Sustainability Plan (DWSSP) te,  District Improvement Plan (DIP) te, MNREGA hnuaia convergence work- Ngopa leh Pawlrang  khuaa Community Saniatry Complex leh Suangpuilawn PWMU Approach Road hnathawhte bakah thil pawimawh hrang hrangte thlirho a ni.

title: KOLASIB SIKUL HRANG HRANGAH NASHA MUKT SAPTAH PUALIN RUIHHLO DO CAMPAIGN NEIH A NI
content:
1167/2026-2027

Kolasib, 24th June, 2026:International Day against Drugs Abuse & Illicit Trafficking denchhenin vawiin khan Kolasib Town chhunga High School leh Higher Secondary School hrang hrangah Ruihhlo Do Campaign neih a ni. He  ni denchhen hian Pu David A. Lalhmingchhuana, DIPRO leh Pi Ngurzampuii , Superintendent, DC office ten school hrang hrangah kal kual in naupangte hnenah ruihhlo that lohzia an zirtir a ni .

Deputy Commissioner, Kolasib District in ruahmanna a siam angin, vawiin hian St. Johns HSS, CZ HSS, Kolasib H/S, Hmarveng H/S, Vengthar Secondary School, Sussane Downs Boarding School leh St. James HS ah te zirtirna hun hi hman a ni a. He hunah hian zirlai naupangte chuan ruihhlo laka fihlim tur leh theihpatawpa ruihhlo do turin thutiam an sawirual a, hei bakah hian signature campaign neih a ni a, ruihhlo ti ngai lo tur leh fihlim tlat turin an hming an sign nghal bawk a ni.

Heng ruihhlo do beihpui thlakna hrang hrangte hi Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan (NMBA) kalphung hnuaia kalpui a ni a. Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan hi India ram pum atanga ruihhlo umbo nana sawrkar laipui hmalakna lian tak a ni. He hmalakna hnuaiah hian ruihhlo that lohzia inhrilhhriatna leh zirtirna uar bika kalpui nan 'Nasha Mukt Saptah' (Ruihhlo do hapta) hman thin a ni a, kuminah pawh he hapta pual hian Kolasib-ah hmalakna hrang hrang kalpui chhoh mek a ni.

Ruihhlo do campaign kal zelah hian hmachhawp hrang hrang ruahman a  ni a. Heng zingah hian kawngzawh (Walkathon) te, mipuite zirtirna atana Awareness Concert te, intiamkamna (Pledge taking) te bakah, Kohhran thalaite hnena ruihhlo that lohzia sawina te leh TNT ah te hun hmang tura ruahmanna siam a ni.

Naktuk June ni 25, 2026 hian Diakkawn H/S, CM High School, H.T High School leh Saidan Sec. School ah te hun hman chhunzawm leh a ni ang.

title: Rural Development Minister Prof. Lalnilawma hovin thingphun hnatlang
content:
1166/2026-2027

Vawiin khan Rural Development Minister Prof. Lalnilawma hovin DRDO Office Aizawl chuan Green Mizoram 2026 denchhenin Sakawrhmuituai tlangah Thingphun hnatlang  an nei a. Thing tiak 20 lai an phun.

Rural Development Minister Prof Lalnilawma chuan tunlaiah sik leh sa danglam zelah ruahtui tlak dan a mumal thei tawh lova; chu chuan chhungtinin kan mamawh em em tui harsatna a  siam nasa em em a ni, a ti a. Khawvel hmun hrang hrangah tui harsatna hian zual lam a pan zel a, boruak thianghlim leh sik leh sa mumal tak min pe theitu thing phun hi a pawimawh em em a ni, a ti. Tam tak phun a pawimawh rualin kan phun chhun ang ang te him taka an dam khawchhuah theih nana uluk taka enkawl zui a pawimawh em em a ni, Minister chuan a ti a.  Mihring te hian kan nitin mamawh ei leh bar zawnna kawngah te kan kih / lak ngaih chang awm ve bawk mah se, kan mamawh bak hi chu khawih loh leh humhalh te, duat taka enkawl te hi kan mawhphurhna a ni tih hre reng turin mipuite a chah a ni.

DRDO Office ten leitha leh a hungna mumal tak nena thingphun hnatlang an ko chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Tui hna humhalhna tur leh a pun belh zel theih nan thingphun leh enkawl zui uar turin Minister chuan a chah a ni.

Mizoram Sawrkar Forest Department te chuan  vawiina thingphun tak te hi  thlawnin an pe a. Pu Lalnundika MCS, Project Director, DRDO leh Dr Lalchamliani, BDO Tlangnuam  leh Sihphir VC ten ruahmanna siamin a huhova thingphun hnatlang hi buatsaih a ni.

title: KHAWZAWLAH NASHA MUKT BHARAT SAPTAH DENCHHENIN MASS RALLY NEIH A NI
content:
1164/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 24th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Nasha Mukt Bharat Bharat Saptah (Drug Free week), ni 17th – 26th June, 2026 chhunga hman mekah Khawzawl District Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan (NMBA) Committee hmalaknain zing dar 07:00 khan Mualvawm Playground atangin DC Office tual thleng Mass Rally neih a ni.Mass Rally hunah hian District NMBA Committee member-te, Khawzawl khawpui chhunga High School leh Higher Secondary School hrang hrang zirlaite an tel a. He hunah hian Ruihhlo ti lo tur leh Ruihhlo laka fihlim tura intiamna (pledge) lak niin signature drive neih a ni bawk a. Pu F. Lalbiakzauva, Superintendent of Police, Khawzawl District-in thusawina hun neiin Pu K. Zorammuana, Addl. Deputy Commissioner-in NMBA T-Shirt leh Cap (lukhum) tlangzarhna hun a nei bawk.Vawiin vek hian Khawzawl District Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan (NMBA) Committee bultumin Deputy Project Officer (Samagra Shiksha) Training Hall-ah High School leh Higher Secondary School naupangte tan ‘On the Spot Painting Competition’ buatsaih a ni bawk.

title: IPRP&S MINISTER-IN KHAWZAWL DIPRO OFFICE A HAWNG
content:
1163/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 24th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery (IPRP&S) Department Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Office of The District Information & Public Relations Officer (DIPRO), Khawzawl District hawngin, a hawnna inkhawm chu khuallian niin a hmanpui nghal a. I&PR Deputy Director Pu Andrew H. Lalremruata’n hun a kaihruai a ni.Khuallian Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Information & Public Relations (I&PR) chu sawrkar hmalakna leh thuchhuah pawimawhte mipuite hriattura puangzartu pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, I&PR a chak loh chuan ram kalphung tam tak hi a tha lo zawngin a nghawng theih thu a sawi a. Tunlai khawvelah thu dik lo leh belhchian dawl lo a thang chak tawh em em a, I&PR chu chutiang thu dik lo do leta thu dik tak leh rintlak chhuahtu pawimawh em em a ni a, hemi kawngah hian Mizoram Journalist Association (MJA) te nen tha taka an thawhho a ngai, a ti a. Vawiin office hawnnaah khawtlang hruaitute leh Head of Office thahnem tak an tel chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, department hrang hrangte inakarah thawhhona tha a awm tih a lantir a ti a.Minister chuan sawrkar hna thawkte chu hlawh la tur ringawta thawk lovin, ram hmangaihna thinlung pu chunga mipuite rawngbawlna a ni tih hriaa, rinawm tak leh inpekna tak tak nena hna thawk turin kalkhawmte a fuih a. Kan hnathawh mi dangin min hriatpui lo a nih pawhin mahni koa tla eng hna pawh rinawm tak leh phur taka kan thawh a pawimawh, a ti a. District hrang hranga DIPRO office-te chu staff leh hmanrua la nei that awk lo mahse rim taka theihtawp chhuaha thawk zel turin a chah bawk a. DIPRO office thar chu Khawzawl district tan malsawmna ni turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.Vawiin office hawnna inkhawmah hian IPRP&S Secretary Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana pawhin thu sawiin, Khawzawl District-a DIRPO office hawn a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu leh hei aia thawm that zel a nih a beisei thu a sawi a. Khawzawl DIPRO Pi Lalchungnungi Lakher chuan Khawzawl DIRPO office chanchin report a pe a. I&PR Director Pi K. Vanlalsangi’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.He hunah hian Directorate of I&PR atangin Dy. Director Pu Pratap Chhetri leh Dy. Director Pi Emily Lalrinpuii Sailo te bakah Saitual DIPRO Pi F. Zodingpuii leh Champhai DIPRO Pu Lalzara te an tel a. Khawzawl official Addl. DC Pu K. Zorammuana, SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva, Minister PS Pu Remlalliana Hnamte, PD Pu K. Lalhmuakliana, SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria, BDO Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha, 2nd IR Commandant Pu Vulmawia Khiangte, PHE EE Pu Liantluanga Chohte, SBI Branch Manager Pu Thangkhanlian Tonsing, GKZC Principal Pi Lalruatmawii Tlau, DC State Tax Pu C. Lalthazuala, DCSO Pu Patrick Thiandinga, DAO Pi Lallawmzuali, DFO Pu Lalnunthanga, END Asst Commissioner Pu Joseph C. Lalhmangaihzuala, CDPO Pi Esther Laltlinpuii te an tel a, SYMA President Pu PC Rosiama leh MHIP President Pi Lalmuanpuii te an tel bawk.Office hawn a nih hma hian Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chu Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana leh official dangte leh Khawzawl MJA member-te nen DC office-ah inkawmna hun an hmang a, DIPRO Office hmun tura ruahman an tlawh ho nghal bawk.

title: Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova'n Champhai chanchinbu mite a kawm
content:
1162/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 24th June 2026:I&PR Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan tukin khan Chanchinbu mite Press Club Champhaiah a kawm.

Chanchinbumite chuan Aizawl pawn District hrang hrang atanga MJA khawmpui leh pawimawh thila member Aizawl kalte tana riah theihna tur hmun buatsaih sak turin an ngen a, I&PR Department Champhai in anmahni puala Office an la nei lo chu hmalaksak vat turin an ngen a, hei bakah Office staff indaih lohna awm ni-a an hriatte hnawhkhahsak thuai turin Minister hi an ngen bawk.

Sum zawnna atana tunlaia a hman apiangin Youtube hmanga chanchin thar rintlak loh leh finfiahna awm mumal lo te, thlitfim pawh ni lem lova tihchhuah thin te hi tihtawp a nih theihna tura hmalak a tul thu te an sawipui bawk.

Hei bakah hian a deparment chan pahnih - Civil Supply Office leh Land Revenue & Settlement Department chak zawka a kal theihna tura hmalak theihna awm ni-a an hriatte an tarlang a, Supply Department bikah Retailer ten ration buhfai an pekchhuah chungchangah dik tawk lo awm thin chungchang an sawipui a, Minister chuan dik lo awm ni-a an hriatah mipuite'n aw an chhuah a tul thu a sawi a, khawla kutzungpui nem lo te'n a thlalehah buhfai an la thei lo tia Retailer te'n an sawi thin chu mipui te bumna a nih thu a sawi a, thla 10 chhung kutzungpui an nem lo a nih chuan paih theih an ni a, thla 10 a tlin hma chuan kutzungpui nem lo mahse an chanpual chu retailer te hian an dah tha reng tur a nih thu a sawi a, kutzungpui nem hman lo ten thlalehah ration buhfai an la thei lo a nih chuan retailer ten an ei ru tihna a nih thu a sawi.

Revenue kaihhnawih bikah Revenue Minister chuan hnathawk an tlem avanga an indaih loh thu a sawi a, kuminah Surveyor 40 lak a nih tur thu leh Champhai ah pawh dah an nih tur thu te, stake holder te nen inhmukhawm a, Champhai phai zawl phei tangkai zawka hman theih dan turte sawiho a tum thu a sawi bawk. Pu Remlalliana PS to Minister pawhin Revenue Department a hna tang tam lutuk tihziaawm na turin Aizawla kalpui mek E-RAM chu Champhai ah pawh nakkum lamah chuan kalpui theih a beisei thu a sawi a, House Pass nei ten LSC a an leh dawn a ram teh that kher ngai thin chu Assembly thukhawm hmasa berah dan thar pharh a nih tur thu leh chu danah chuan ram teh that kher ngai hi paih a nih tawh tur thu a tarlang ve bawk.

I&PR Minister chuan I&PR Department ram nimin lama a en tawh thu leh M Plan hmanga proposal awm mek pawh bawhzui a tum thu a sawi a, Staff indaih lohnaah pawh theihtawp chhuah a tum thu a sawi a ni

title: Lungleiah District Sports Committee an ṭhu khawm
content:
1161/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 24:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Sports Committee (LDSC) chu Lunglei District Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Zoramdini kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm.

LDSC Secretary, District Sports & Youth Officer Pu Rozamliana'n report pein, thu ngaihtuah tur a sawi zau va. Financial Secretary Pu K. Lawmchhunga hnen aṭangin sum dinhmun ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

Vawiin ṭhut khawmah hian Lunglei District chhunga sports association hrang hrangte'n District ai awha an feh chhuahnaa an sensote phuhrukna tura sum (promotional fund) an dilnate thlir ho niin, LDSC inkaihhruaina anga Inter-District inelnaa District ai awha feh chhuakte kal lam emaw, haw lam emaw lirthei chuan man (sumo fare) rulh letna tur pek theih chin chu pawmsak an ni a. Felfai zawka thil kalpui a nih theih nan inelnaa kal man senso phuhrukna tur dilna hi sports association-te'n inelna zawh hnu thla hnih chhungin LDSC-ah lehkha pawimawh hrang hrang thil telin theh luh hman tum ni se, hun tiam chhunga theh lut hman lote dilna chu ngaihtuah zui loh ni se, tih a ni.

LDSC hnuaia sports association-te hlawhtlinna leh chet velna hrang hrangte felfai zawka chhinchhiah a nih theih nan DSYO lamin report theh luhna tur inang tlang lo ruahman se, chumi hmang chuan sports association-te'n kum 2025–2026 chhunga an chet velna leh hlawhtlinna chanchinte LDSC-ah lo theh lut se, tih a ni a. Sports association hrang hrangte intuamhlawmna tur sum mamawh hmuh belh a nih theih nana hma lak dan tur te sawi ho a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia CM Special Package leh loan dilna lutte en hona neiin MPSCC leh Implementing Department Nodal Officer-te thukhawm
content:
1160/2026-2027

Aizawl, dated 24th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Planning & Programme Implementation Department Committee Room-ah Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia Chief Minister Special Package leh Loan Component dilna lut tharte en hona hun hman niin, MPSCC Vice Chairman Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva chuan thutkhawm hi a kaihruai a ni.

Hun kaihruaitu Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva chuan Bana Kaih Scheme chu mi taima leh tumruh, hlawhtling tura theihna leh thiamna neite khai chhuahna tura ruahman a nih angin, Implementing Department tin a Nodal leh Assistant Nodal Officer-te chuan dilna lutte chu uluk taka zirchiang zel turin a chah a. Thiamna leh theihna nei, mi taimate khai chhuahna chuan an mahni eizawnna kawngah hlawhtlinna a thlen dawn bakah ram tih hmasawnna kawnga hmanraw tangkai an nih theih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia Chief Minister Special Package leh Loan assistance dilna lutte chu uluk taka thlîr ho niin, Implementing Department pasarih (7) hnuaia dilna lut tharte vawiin hian en ho a ni a. Cooperation Department hnuaiah dilna 8, Horticulture Department - 1, UD&PA department hnuaiah dilna 7, LESDE hnuaiah dilna 10, Tourism department hnuaiah dilna 10, Land Resource, Soil & Water Conservation - 11 leh Commerce & Industries Department hnuaia dilna lut 378-te en ho a ni. Loan assistance dilna lutte en dik a ni bawk.

Serchhip district-a NABARD hnuaia tribal chhungkaw dinhmun chawisanna tur, TRIBES leh ATMA Serchhip district kaltlanga Bana Kaih scheme tangkawpa hmalakna thilr ho a ni a. Hei hian kuthnathawka eizawng chhungkaw 400 bakah puan tah leh puanthuia eizawng chhungkaw 100 a tuam a. Hualtu, Hmuntha, Khawbel, Sialsir, Serchhip, Chhiahtlang leh Thenzawlah Tung, Chhawchhi, Litchi, Lakhuihthei leh Sawhthing hmun siam turin ruahmanna kalpui mek a nih thu tarlan a ni a. He program kalpui nan hian chhungkaw pakhat tan TRIBES atangin Rs. 80,000 bawr vel NABARD-in a tum sak anga, Bana Kaih Scheme atangin Sawrkarin Rs. 19,000 bawr vel a tum bawk dawn a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Biofertilizer uar zawka hman pawimawhzia sawi ho niin, Agriculture, Horticulture leh Veterinary & Animal Husbandry thawhhona a tul zia sawi lan niin, Mizoram chu Organic State ni turin ‘Biofertilizers’ siam chhuah leh nasa zawk a hman a pawimawhzia zirtirna kalpui a nih theih nan Bana Kaih Scheme chu tangkai taka hman a nih tur thu sawi a ni a. Tun dinhmuna Biofertilizer kan hman dan leh kan mamawh dan zirchiang turin Task Force din a tul thu rel a ni. Sawhthing thar chhuahte vawn ṭhat reng an nih theih nan leh kut hna thawkten an thar chhuahte rualkhai zawk leh man tha zawka an hralh theih nan, Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaiah hian Root Cellar siam hna chu kalpui ngei ni se tiin an rel bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia CM Special Package leh Loan Assistance dawngtute hmasawnna tehfung chhinchhiahna tur duan chhin, Achievement Report Format en hona neih a ni a. Foreign placement loan leh Education Loan chungchângte thlir ho niin, Industrial & Processing unit-te tana last mile connectivity support pek dan tur inkaihhruaina siamte thlir ho a ni bawk.

He thutkhawmah hian P&PI Department Secretary Pu David Lalthantluanga leh Mizoram State Project Coordination Committee Member-te leh Bana Kaih Scheme Implementing Department atangin Nodal Officer leh Assistant Nodal Officer-te an tel a. NABARD Assistant General Manager leh Serchhip District ATMA Project Director chuan Serchhip District-a TRIBE leh Bana Kaih Scheme hmanga kuthnathawktute tihhmasawn hna an kalpui dan report an pe bawk a ni.

Compliance Reduction & Deregulation Reforms Programme, Ease of Doing Business kalpui mêk chungchang a sawinaah hian Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena, IAS leh official pawimawhten an tawiawm a. title: Health & Family Welfare department changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan State level Kayakalp Awardee-te chawimawina a hmanpui
content:
1158/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl; 24th June, 2025:Vawiin khan National Health Mission, Health & Family Welfare Department buatsaih State Felicitation Of Kayakalp Awardees Mizoram (2025-2026) chu Health & Family Welfare department changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan BSI Hall, Bible House, Khatla ah a hmanpui.

Minister chuan hospital leh health facility a thawktute inpekna leh thawhrimna avanga he tiang programme an hmang thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi. India ram pumah faina ngaih pawimawh niin, Swatch Bharat campaign te pawh neih ṭhin a ni a; Kayakalp pawh hi he Swatch Bharat initiative hnuai ami niin, Kayakalp Scheme in a tum ber chu Cleanliness – Faina hi a nih thu a sawi bawk. Mizoram chhunga damdawiin hrang hrangte, Sub-Centre atanga PHC, District Hospital thlengin an faiin an thianghlim hle a, tawktute inpekna leh thawhhona tha avanga hlawhtling thei a ni a, a ropui hle a ni, a ti.

Minister chuan Kayakalp kalpui a nihna chhan pakhat chu – mipuite hian Indian Constitution hnuaiah Right to Health kan neih vang a nih thu a sawi a, Constitution chuan Right to Live hi mi zawng zawng fundamental right atan min pe a, Right to Live hnuaia pawimawh ber te zinga mi chu Right to Health a nih thu a sawi bawk. Mipuite hian hospital fai leh thianghlima inentir hi an dikna leh chanvo a ni a, chumi tur chuan thawktute hmalakna leh tanrualna a pawimawh a tih thu a sawi a ni.

Minister chuan faina kan kalpuinaah hian pawnlam faina chauh ngaipawihmawh loin, Kayakalp-ah chuan natna darh tur venna lam- infection prevention-te, damlote himna mai bakah quality healthcare-te kan ngaihpawimawh ber a ṭul hle a ni, a ti. Minister chuan Kayakalp leh NQAS laimu ber chu hawihhawmna a nih thu sawiin, “Ka chah duh ber chu damlo damdawiin an rawn panin hawihhawm  leh rang taka lo buaipui zung zung tur leh enkawlna dik an mamawh ngei an dawn theihna tur a hmalak hi a ni”, a ti.

State Level Kayakalp Award dawngtute:

Health & Wellness Centre Award (HWC)

Aizawl East

1. Tlungvel HWC-SC

2. Seling HWC-SC

Aizawl West

1.Tlangnuam HWC-SC

2. Republic HWC-SC

1. Tumpui HWC-SC

2. North Chaltlang HWC-SC

1. Mampui HWC-SC

1. Rahsi Veng HWC-SC

2. Mualthuam North HWC-SC

Serchhip

1. Hmuntha HWC-SC

2. Zote South HWC-SC

Primary Heath Centre (PHC) Award:

Aizawl East

1. Suangpuilawn PHC

2. Khawruhlian PHC

3. Phulen PHC

Aizawl West

1. Sialsuk PHC

Champhai

1. Farkawn PHC

2. Hnahlan PHC

3. Khawbung PHC

Kolasib

1. Bairabi PHC

2. Kawnpui PHC

Lawngtlai

1. Bualpui NG PHC

Lunglei

1. Thingsai PHC

2. Haulawng PHC

3. Buarpui PHC

Mamit

1. Rawpuichhip PHC

2. Reiek PHC

3. Kanghmun PHC

Serchhip

2. Ngentiang PHC

3. Chhingchhip PHC

2. Phura PHC

Urban Primary Health Centre Award:

2. Zemabawk, Aizawl East , Sazaikawn, Lunglei

3. Hrangchalkawn, Lunglei

Community Health Centre (CHC) / Sub-DISTRICT HOSPITAL (SDH) Award :

2. Vairengte CHC

3. Sakawrdai CHC

2. Aizawl West (ZMC&H)

3. Civil Hospital Lunglei

2. Saiha DH

Eco-Friendly Community Health Centre (CHC) / Sub-DISTRICT HOSPITAL (SDH) Award :

2. Biate CHC

3. Thenzawl CHC

Kayakalp Award Scheme hi Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (MoHFW) bul tanna, Swachh Bharat Mission hnuaia hmalakna peng pakhat a ni a. Sorkar damdawiin leh clinic-ah faina, hriselna, bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna leh natna inkaichhawn laka himna kawnga hma la tha ber bertute chawimawina leh ṭan lak tharna tur atana buatsaih a ni.

“Kayakalp” hi faina kawnga Sawrkar damdawi inte inelna niin, endikna tur duansa (checklist) hmangin chhawng thuma endik vek an ni a – damdawi in leh a chhehvel felfai taka an enkawl danah te, damdawi in aṭanga bawlhhlawh chhuak thliar hrana natna hrik inkaidarh lohna tura sawngbawl hnua a paihna hmun dik taka paih a nih dan te, thawktute’n an hna bil ṭheuh an thiam dan te, damlote ngaihdan lakna (patient satisfaction survey) te, khawtlang nena faina kawnga an thawhhona te leh eco-friendly lama an hmalakna te endik an ni.

Health & Family Welfare Department in a programme a buatsaihah hian NHM Mission Director, Dr. R.Lalchhuanawma'n a kaihruai a, State Nodal Officer (QA) Dr Vanlalrengpuia' n report tawi  pe bawkin; Dr. Lily Chhakchhuak, Director DHS , Dr. Zonunmawii Pachuau, Director DHME, Dr. R. Lalchhuanawma, Mission Director NHM, State Level Officer te, Sr leh Deputy CMO-te leh Sr leh Deputy Medical Superintendent-te kim chang takin an tel.

title: Hnahthial District Level Monitoring Cell thukhawmin LPG leh POL dinhmun thlir ho
content:
1157/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthal, the 24thJune, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall No-I ah District Level Monitoring Cell (DLMC) Chairman leh Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pi K.Vanlalruati kaihhruaiin DLMC thutkhawmna neih a ni a. Hnahthial District chhunga LPG leh POL dinhmun bakah agenda hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

DCSO leh DLMC Member Secretary ni bawk, Dr. Michael Solo hnen atangin Hnahthial District tana LPG leh POL stock dinhmun ngaihthlak a ni a. Report ngaihthlak zawh hnu hian Bawrhsap chuan khawvel pum buaina avangin Hnahthial pawhin harsatna an tawk ve ni a lan thu a sawiin chumi a nih rual chuan mipui mamawh phuhruk tur khawpin stock a la that thu a sawi a. Petrol leh Diesel ah phei chuan thlaphanna chhan tur engmah aw awm loh thu a sawi bawk.

Bawrhsap chuan LPG Distributor-te chu mipuite harsatna hriatthiampui tura chahin tawngkam hawihawm nen mipuite lo thlamuantu ni thin turin a chah a. Chutih rual chuan a hma anga stock tam a awm thei tawh lo tih mipuite chuan lo hriatthiampui se duh thu a sawi a ni.

DCSO chuan LPG stock chu duhthusamin tam lo mah se mipuite mamawhna phuhruk tur khawp chu a awm thu a sawi a. Petrol leh Diesel-ah erawh harsatna engmah a awm loh thu a sawi a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Addl DC, Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte bakah Hnahthial District Consumer Union hruaitute, CL Indane leh Fidelia Indane neitute leh Hnahthial Mizofed leh Johannapa Filling Station neitute thukhawmin DAC chungchanga harsatna te, dan phal chin baka Petrol leh Diesel hralh chhuah chungchangte leh pawimawh dang hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

title: Mizoram Youth Commission leh Drishti IAS tangkawp buatsaih 'Free UPSC Coaching Programme' hawn a ni
content:
1156/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Youth Commission (MYC) chuan Drishti IAS coaching institute nena tangkawpa an buatsaih 'Free UPSC Coaching Programme' chu MYC Auditorium, MINECO, Khatla-ah hawn a ni a. Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena chuan khuallian niin Coaching programme hi a hawng a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian Pu Khilli Ram Meena chuan thu sawiin, March 2025-a Union Home Minister Pu Amit Shah-in Mizoram a rawn tlawh khan, Mizoram-in harsatna hrang hrang a tawh mekte chu sawi ho turin Mizoram-a Civil Society Organisation-te nen an inkawm a ni tih a sawi a. Chumi inkawmhona atang chuan Mizoram atanga IAS tling hnuhnung ber pawh kum 2014-a tling niin, Mizoram atanga All India leh Central Civil Services-a inziak tling an tlem hle tih a lang chhuak a. He thu hi ngai pawimawhin State official-te chuan ngaihtuahna leh sawihona an neih hnuah tuna Free UPSC Coaching Programme hi an duang chhuak a, India rama Coaching Institute hlun leh changtlung berte zinga mi Drishti IAS, New Delhi chu thlan a ni, a ti.

Zirlaite fuihin, Chief Secretary(CS) chuan hlawhtling tur hian rim taka thawh loh chu kawng dang a awm lo tih a sawi a; chuvangin zirlaiten coaching-a zirtirtute puihna rinchhana thahnemngai taka thawk tur leh an elpuite (competitors) umpha renga an rilrua hlawhtling tura tuihalna chu engtik lai pawhin awm tir reng turin a chah a ni. Hemi bakah hian CS chuan coaching programme leh zirlaite tan mamawh ang angah puihna pe turin Mizoram Sawrkar chu a inpeih reng a ni tih sawiin, zirlaite chu thil dang ngaihtuah buai lovin an theihtawp chhuah turin a chah bawk a ni.

MYC Chairman Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte pawhin thu sawiin, Mizoram-ah hian Central Civil Services exam-a hlawhtlinna thlen tumin Kohhran, Sawrkar leh khawtlang mite chuan an theih ang angin an thawk a, mahse hlawhtlinna chu mimal tumna leh thawh rimna hmang chauhin a thleng thei tih a sawi a. Zirlaite chu an vanneihzia hrilhin he coaching programme hi hmang tangkai a, an theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a, an kal zelna tur atan duhsakna a hlan bawk a ni.

Keynote address sawiin MYC Secretary Pi V. Lalmuanpuii chuan Mizo thalai tam tak chuan State pawn lamah zirnan sum leh thil mamawh dang an neih tawk loh avangin Central Civil Services-a an luh tumna chu an bansan fo thin a ti a. Thalaite ah investment siam hi investment tha ber a ni tih hre reng chungin, Chief Secretary leh LESDE Department official-te kaihhruaina hnuaiah, he programme hi thalaite kawng hawnsak tura ruahman a ni, a ti.

He hunah hian Drishti IAS Associate Vice-President Pu Georgi Mathan Ninan pawhin thu sawiin, Mizo khawtlang chuan 'Tlawmngaihna' ang civil servant te tana mizia hlu tak tak an vawng a ti a. Drishti IAS chuan zirlaite chu Central Services an luh ngei a, Mizo nun ze mawi chu khawvel hmun hrang hranga an thehlar theih nan theihtawp an chhuah tur thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin coaching programme hawnna inkhawm hi MYC-a zirtirtu Pu Lalremruata Tuallawt in kaihruaiin kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi bawk a. MYC Under Secretary Pi Lalramdini'n lawmthu sawina in hun hi a khar a. LESDE Secretary Dr. Lalhriatzuali Ralte, LESDE Director Pi Pinky Zosangpuii, Drishti IAS-a Chief Content Creator Pu Neel Parmar, Drishti IAS-a zirtirtu Pu Vivek Kaushik te bakah MYC official dangte an tel bawk a ni.

FREE UPSC COACHING PROGRAMME CHANCHIN TLANGPUI:

UPSC hnuaia Civil Services Examination-ah Mizo thalaite an luh hnem lehzual theihna turin, Mizoram Sawrkar chuan Mizoram Youth Commission kaltlangin thla 12 chhung a thlawna UPSC Coaching kalpui tura ruahmanna thar a siam a.

Hemi atan hian India rama Coaching Institute hlun leh changtlung berte zinga mi Drishti IAS, New Delhi nen thawhdunna thuthlung an ziak a ni. Uluk taka screening process neih a nih hnuah UPSC aspirant 100 thlan chhuah an ni a, he coaching program hnuaia class-te hi 24th March 2026, atang khan kal tan a ni.

He programme hnuaiah hian General Studies class chu offline-in neih a ni a, Optional subject paruk -Political Science & International Relations, Geography, Sociology, Anthropology, History leh Public Administration chu online-in zirtir a ni bawk. Hemi bakah hian, Aizawl pawna mi zirlaite tan hostel facility pawh siam a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN RED RIBBON QUIZ COMPETITION CHUNGCHANGAH DISTRICT AIDS PREVENTION & CONTROL COMMITEE (DAPCC) THUKHAWM
content:
1155/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 24th June 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 2: 00 PM khan Lawngtlai bawrhsap leh Chairman, District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC) nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin a Office Chamber-ah ' Red Ribbon Quiz Competition 2026' chungchang sawihoa thutkhawm a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan DAPCC Member-lo kalte hnenah lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Red quiz competition- buatsaih thin chuan HIV/ AIDS dona kawngah rah tha tak a chhuah thin thu tarlangin, kuminah pawh tha leh felfai taka buatsaih a tul dawn hle a ti a. Mizoram dinhmun thlirin HIV/ AIDS do rêm turin tan lak a ngai hle tiin, sawrkar, NGO, Kohhran leh mipuiten theihtawp chhuah a ngai a ti a. Red Ribbon Quiz Competition - chuan zirlaiteah hriatna zauzawk a thlen ngei a beisei tih tarlangin bawrhsap chuan HIV/ AIDS- do kawngah Lawngtlai District- in rahbi thar kai ngei a beisei tlat thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian District Level- a 'Red Ribbon Quiz Competition 2026' buatsaih dan tur kawng hrang hrang sawiho a ni a. Red Ribbon Quiz Competition - hi July ni 29 (Wednesday) ah neih ni se, buaipuitu atan DISHA ruat niin, DC Conference Hall- ah neih ni se an ti a. DEO lamin School-tinah Quiz Competition - a tel tura sawmna lo siam se tih niin, School - 15 aia tam an awm chuan 'Online Screening Test' ni 24 (Friday) ah neih hmasak a, school titha pali te tan District Level - inelna buatsaih leh ni se an ti a ni. Quiz Master atan Pu Elvis Lalthangzuala, President, MJA Lawngtlai chu sawm ni se an ti bawk a ni.

District Level Red Ribbon Quiz Competition - a Pakhatna hi State level-ah District aiawhin an chhuak ang a, State level-a pakhatna hi Regional level-a inel tura chhuak lehin, chumi an paltlang chuan National Level - inelnaah an chhuak leh dawn a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC) Member- te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: Mamit District Aspirational District atanga hmasawnna hnathawhte thlirho
content:
1154/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 24th of June, 2026: Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Window-I of Aspirational Mamit District Programme hnuaia hmasawnna hnathawh mek Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hovin thlirho a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Pi Carolyn LB. Khiangte, Addl. DC chuan Mamit District Aspirational Programme hnuaia Mamit District dinhmun leh India ram puma inelna hrang hranga lawmman kan lo lak tawhte leh lawmmanin a ken tel sum kan hmuh leh hmasawnna hnathawhna atana hman a nih dan hrang hrangte a tarlanga, Sawrkar laipui kaltlanga sum hmuhte duh hun leh tum anga hmuh theih a nih bik loh dan leh District Administration atanga tihtur awmte rang taka thlen thlak zung zung thin a nih thute a tarlang tel bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian NITI Aayog atanga Mamit District Aspirational Programme hnuaiah Champions of Change inelnaa a titha lawmman - Financial Inclusion sector ah 1na nih man lawmman Rs.3 crore Mamit District in a dawn hmanga Mamit GSA Playground-a artificial grass  phah hna thawh tur lehOverall sector-ah 4na ni a Rs 2 crore lawmman hmangaMamit Hmarvenga Vikas Bhavan Building sak mekte sawiho niin hna tha zawka thawh a nih theihna tura rawtna hrang hrangte sawiho a ni.

Hnathawktute RM Consultancy & Construction leh Meckavo, Sports Infrustructure Pvt. Ltd atangin an hna thawh tawh leh hmalak lehna tura an ruahmannate a lem nen an tarlang bawk a ni.

Niti Aayog atanga hmasawnna hna kal mekte hi District Rural Development Office kaltlanga thawh niin Pu Lalchhanhima, Project Director,DRDO chuan hnathawktute'n tha taka hma an lak zui zel theihna tura a line department nena in pawh taka kal a tul thu sawiin mamawh leh tul an neihah dawr hrehlo turin a chah bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, SDO (S) bakah khawthlang hruaitute leh Games & Sports hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SCHOOL EDUCATION MINISTER HOVIN SCHOOL EDUCATION DEPARTMENT QUARTERLY REVIEW MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
1153/2026-2027

Aizawl the 24th June, 2026:Vawiin khan School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana hovin School Education Complex Conference Hall Macdonald hill-ah School Education Department Officer ten Quarterly Review Meeting vawi 8-na an nei.

He Meeting-ah hian School Education Minister chuan thusawiin Pathianin kan ram hma lam hun hi zirna lama thawktute kutah a dah a, mawhphurhna kan neih ang hian kan che chhuak em tih inenfiah a ngai a ti a. Meeting ațang hian thil nih dan dik tak an hriat phah țhin tih sawiin Mizoram Education Reforms Committee-in rawtna an dawn te an sawiho țhin thu a sawi a. School-ah kalphung țha kan neih a ngai a, kalphung țha kan hman ngam leh hman theih tur kan duan a ngai a, kan hnunga lo awm zel turte pawhin an hman tur system țha kan siam a ngai a, chumi atan chuan data kan neih țhat pawh a ngai a ni a ti a, MERC pawhin kalphung țha nei turin ngaihtuahna a hmang mek a ni a ti.

Minister chuan Officer kalkhawmte chu thurawn leh rawtna nei țhin turte, thil țhaah chuan huai taka pen chhuak ngam tur leh kal dan țha zawk a awm a nih chuan sawi ngam tur leh infinchhuah ngaihna apianga finchhuah țhin turin a chah bawk. Thil dik lo dan kalha thil tih te a awm chuan kal thui hmaa inhrilha a țha zawk turah chuan insiamțhat hi mitinin kan tih tur a ni a ti.

Minister chuan kan hma lam hunah kan tu leh faten zirna siamțhat a nih ațang khan hei hi kan nei ve thei ta an tih theihna tura ruahmanna neih țhat a pawimawh thu te sawiin hma lam hun atana inzira inchhiar zau turin official te a chah bawk. Minister chuan zirlaite an zirna kawngah an hlawhtling ta lo a nih pawhin eizawnna kawng an zawh theih nan intodelhna project kalpui mek a nih thu leh tun aia zau zawka kalpui dan ngaihtuah a țul thu a sawi bawk.

Education Consultant Rev Dr K. Thanzauva pawhin thusawiin hmasawnna chi hrang hrangte hi han thawk bawk mah ila, rual kan pawl ve theihna tur leh kan ramin ramdang ruala ke a pen ve theihna awm chhun chu zirna hi a ni a ti a. Zirna siamțhatna kawngah kohhran, sorkar leh mipui țanho a țul thu a sawi.

Quarterly Review meeting-ah hian Department hnathawh leh hmalakna chi hrang hrangte thlirho a ni a, School Education Directorate-in hna lakna tura rules leh syllabus ennawn mek an buaipui dan te report a ni a, SCERT, MBSE leh Samagra Shiksha hmalakna te leh hnathawh te thlirho a ni bawk a. Department chhunga hmalakna leh hmachhawp te an sawiho bawk.

Minister hova Quarterly Review Meeting-ah hian Education Secretary Pi Ramdinliani,EducationConsultant Rev Dr K.Thanzauva, Mizoram Education Reforms Committee Working Chairman Prof Lalbiakdiki Hnamte te,  Mizo Language Development Board Chairman Pu R.Lallianzuala, School Education Secretariat leh Directorate Officer te, SCERT,  MBSE leh Samagra Shiksha officer te an tel a, District tina District Education Officer ten video conferencing hmangin meeting hi an lo zawm bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga’n 14th state level library seminar & training for government recognised libraries hawnna hmanpui
content:
1152/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th June 2026:Vawin khan 14th State Level Library seminar & training for government recognised libraries, June 24 leh 25 awh tur hawnna inkhawm chu Chanmari Y.M.A hall-ah neih a ni a, Art & Culture dept. Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan thu sawiin, state level library seminar & training-a kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu sawiin, library hmasawnna tura Art & Culture Dept, Mizoram, Raja Rammohun Roy Library Foundation (RRRLF) leh Mizoram Library Association-te tangkawpin hetiang hun tha a buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Library pawimawihna sawiin, hriatna tipungtu, hmasawnna kawng min zawhtir theitu, zirna leh thiamna lama puitu tha tak a nih thu a sawi a, library-te ngaihhlut leh roh nachang hriat pawimawh a tih thu a sawi bawk. Lehkhabu te a nihna tur dik taka hman an nih chuan an tangkai em em a, mipuite banphak leh chhawr theih tura lehkhabu tha te dahtu chu library a nih thu a sawi a ni.

Minister chuan internet-khawvel-ah kan cheng a, chu chuan kan nun dan a thlak danglam avangin, hmasawnna kawngah nasa takin min pui bawk mah se, chin dan tha lehkhachhiar thlahthlam phah lo turin kalkhawmte chu a fuih a, chutiang a thlen lohna turin library leh a hnathawktute chu an pawimawh thu a sawi. Library chu thu leh hlaa hausakna tipungtu mai bakah thil chhinchhiah leh hriatreng atana pawimawhte dahthatna (record) hmun a ni a, library-a uluk taka sulhnu (history) vawn nachang kan hriat a pawimawh thu sawiin, Mizo history leh nihna(identity) chian lehzualna atan library-te an pawmawh tih a sawi.

Khuallian chuan sawrkarin library-te hmasawnna tur a ngaipawimawh tih sawiin, India ram pum huapa Public Library te tih hmasawnna tur atan Ministry of Culture hnuaia autonomous organization Raja Rammohun Roy Library Foundation (RRRLF) chuan scheme hrang hrang kaltlangin tanpuina a pe chhuak thin a. Heng scheme-te hi Matching Scheme leh Non-Matching Scheme a then niin, Matching Scheme-hi 90:10 ratio-in Central leh State share in kalpui a ni a. Mizoram Public Library te tan scheme hnuaia tanpuina te hi Art & Culture Department kaltlangin kum tin dil thin niin, a rah chhuah pawh kan hmu tam tawh hle a ni.

Building Grant Rs. 6 lakh zelin NGO Library 137 te’n an dawng tawh a. Steel Book Rack (Godrej) pawh Library 426-ah sem tawh niin. Kum tin recognised NGO Library te hnenah lehkhabu thar hrang hrang sem chhuah thin a ni bawk, a ti a. Kum hmasa ah Computer tha tak mai Library 34-ah sem a ni a, digital hmasawnna nen library service tihchangtlunna atan a tangkai hle thu a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan Mizoram chhungah library chi hrang hrang- Mizoram State Library, District library Aizawl, Lunglei, Kolasib leh Champhai-ah te leh recognised NGO library 518 a awm mek thu sawiin, kalkhawmte chu hmang tangkai turin a chah bawk a ni. Library tha thlanna neih a ni thin chu tha tiin, kum 2017 hnua neih a ni tawh lo erawh chu pawi a ti a, thlan chhunzawn a nih theihna turin hmalak tha a tih thu a sawi bawk. Kalkhawmte chu mipui rawngbawl an ni tih inhriaa, ram leh hnam tana ke pen zel turin a fuih bawk a ni.

Inkhawm hi Director, Art & Culture Pi Carol VLMS Dawngkimi chuan kaihruaiin, President MLA, Pu Dr. Lalbiaksanga atangin thusawi tawi ngaihthlak a niin, General Secy., MLA, Pu Dr. Jacob MS Dawngliana hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni bawk a ni. Inkhawm hi Mizoram State Librarian, Pu Zothanglawra Ralte chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

Inkhawmah hian Library & Information Science subject-a PhD hmu thar chawimawina hun neih a ni a, chawimawina dawngtute chu:

1. Esther Lalruatpuii2. Ruth Lalthlamuanpuii3. Lianhmingthangi Hnamte4. R. Laltlanzova5. Oliver Lalthlengliana6. Zorinpuia7. Lalhmangaihsangi Sailo8. Lalremsiama9. Vanlalfeli

Attachment

title: CSR PROJECT FOR GROUNDWATER REJUVENATION LAUNCHED AT DARZO VILLAGE WITH SUPPORT FROM BHARAT FORGE LIMITED
content:
198/2026-2027

Aizawl, 24 June 2026:A Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) project aimed at groundwater rejuvenation in Darzo Village was officially launched today at the office of Shri TBC Lalvenchhunga, Adviser to the Chief Minister (Finance & Planning), Government of Mizoram. The project is being funded by Bharat Forge Limited and implemented through the CII Foundation in collaboration with the Village Council of Darzo.

The project will be executed by Young Indians (Yi), the youth wing of the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII). Significantly, the Yi Mizoram Chapter has become the first Young Indians chapter in the country to successfully facilitate and implement a CSR project of this nature. This milestone reflects the chapter’s growing commitment to community development and sustainable impact. Building on this achievement, Yi Mizoram is actively pursuing several other CSR initiatives to address key developmental needs across the state through partnerships with industry and local stakeholders.

Addressing the gathering, Shri TBC Lalvenchhunga underscored the importance of CSR initiatives in complementing the State Government’s development priorities. He commended Bharat Forge Limited and the CII Foundation for their commitment to sustainable community development, noting that such partnerships play a vital role in addressing local challenges and improving the quality of life in rural areas.

Dr. Leena Deshpande, Vice President and Head–CSR, Bharat Forge Limited, who attended as Guest of Honour, reaffirmed the company’s commitment to creating sustainable and long-term social impact through its CSR programmes. She expressed confidence that the groundwater rejuvenation project would significantly benefit the people of Darzo and serve as a model for community-led water conservation efforts.

A detailed presentation on the project was delivered by Francis L. Khiangte, Co-Chair, Yi Mizoram, who outlined its objectives and anticipated impact. The initiative aims to enhance groundwater recharge, improve water availability, and promote sustainable water resource management in Darzo Village. Under the project, 1,000 recharge trenches will be excavated across 1.93 hectares of land. Each trench will measure 10 feet in length, 6 feet in width, and 1.5 feet in depth.

A key highlight of the event was the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between Bharat Forge Limited, the CII Foundation, and the Village Council of Darzo, formalising their partnership for the implementation of the project.

Shri Lalramchhana, President of the Village Council, Darzo, also addressed the gathering and expressed his gratitude to all stakeholders, including the CSR Cell, Bharat Forge Limited, the CII Foundation, and Yi Mizoram, for selecting Darzo Village for the initiative.

The groundwater rejuvenation project is expected to strengthen water sustainability in Darzo Village while contributing to broader efforts toward environmental conservation and community development in Mizoram.

The programme was chaired by Alan Lalhriatpuia, Chapter Chair, Yi Mizoram and Co-Chair, CII Mizoram, who welcomed the gathering and highlighted the importance of collaborative efforts among government, industry, and local communities in addressing developmental challenges. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Lalchhanhimi, State Head, CII Mizoram, who acknowledged the contributions of all partners and stakeholders involved in making the initiative a reality.

Attachment

title: PU TBC LALVENCHHUNGAN DARZO KHUAA TUIHNA TIHPUNNA TUR CSR PROJECT HAWNG
content:
1151/2026-2027

Aizawl the 24th June 2026:Vawiin khan Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga, MLA, Adviser to CM chuan a office-ah Bharat Forge leh Confederation of Indian Industries (CII) ten Darzo khuaa tuihna tihpunna tur project, Corporate Social Responsibility Fund atanga an thawh tur chu a hawng.

He CSR Project hmang hian Darzo khaw ram 1.93 Hectare a zauah ruahtui tlinna tur khur (trenches) 1000 laih tur a ni a, hna hi Young Indian Mizoram ten an thawk ang. Young Indian te hi Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) hnuaia thalai pawl an ni a. He project hi India rama Young Indian ten hetiang lam chi CSR Project an thawh hmasak ber tur a ni.

Pu TBC Lalvenchhunga chuan, Darzo khuaa tuihna tihpunna (Ground Water Rejuvenation) project an rawn kalpui avangin Bharat Forge chungah lawmthu a sawi a. CSR Cell ten hma kan lak tirh ata vawiin thlengin Bharat Forge te hian min thawhpui tha em em a. An chungah kan lawm a ni, a ti a. Mizoramin CSR tam zawk a hmuh theihna tura theihtawp chhuah rengtu CII Mizoram chungah pawh lawmthu sawiin, project hlawhtling tak kan lo beisei dawn a ni, a ti.

Dr. Leena Deshpande, Vice President and Head – CSR, Bharat Forge Limited pawhin thusawiin, Bharat Forge hian thingtlang lamah hmalakna kan la ngah lutuk lo va. Maharashtra state-ah khuan thingtlang khaw 125 velah Livelihood programme kan kalpui mek. Kan CSR te hi hlawk leh tangkai taka hman kan duh a, khuarei daih (sustainable) thil zel tih theihte pawh tha kan ti thin. Darzo project pawh hi vawiina mite leh chhuan lo la awm zel turte tana tangkai tur project a ni a. Tuihna humhalhna leh tihpunna lama hmahruaitu tha tak a nih kan beisei a ni, a ti.

Pu Lalramchhana, VCP, Darzo pawhin thusawiin, he hmalakna hian Darzo khaw tan khuarei thlenga tangkai tur tuihna min tihpunsakin, ramngaw humhalh zelna kawngah min tanpui dawn a. Keini leh kan tu leh fa lo awm zel turte tana project tangkai niin kan hria. Sum rawn thawhtu Bharat Forge leh CII te chungah kan lawm hle a ni, a ti.

Project hawnna inkhawmah hian he Project kalpui tura inremna (Memorandum of Understanding) inhlan tawnna Bharat Forge, CII leh Darzo VC ten an nei nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP - IN MHS LEH MAS A INZIAK TLINGTE LAWMPUINA NEI
content:
1150/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 24th June 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan MPSC (Combined Technical ) Examination 2025 - a Jr. Grade of Mizoram Horticulture Service (MHS) a inziak tling Pi B. Lalramhlimi, Electric Veng leh Jr. Grade of Mizoram Agriculture Service (MAS) a inziak tling Pu Lalramdinmawia, Chandmary - te chu a Office Chamber- ah lawmpuina a nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan hlawhtlinna changtate lawmpuina hlanin, an thawhrimna, inpekna leh District - tihmingthatu an nihna chu midangte tan entawn tlak tak a ni, a ti a. Lawngtlai District- ah Zirna tihmasawn tura chak taka hmalak mek a nih laiin Mizoram pum huapa mithiam an lo chhuak zel thin chu lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang a. A bik takin kumin bikah MPSC in Exam a buatsaihah Lawngtlai District- atanga lawmpuina hlan tur an awmfo chu thinking taka lawmawm a tih thu a tarlang a. Zirnaah Zirlaite piah lamah Zirtirtu leh nu leh Pate an pawimawh tak zet tiin, zirna lama hmasawn tura tan la thar zel turin a chah a. Bawrhsap chuan sawrkar hnathawkte chu ram leh mipuite tana thawk tur an nih angin vawiina hlawhtlinna changte pawh sawrkara an luh hunah thahnem ngai leh rma hmangaihna nen a thawk turin a chah nghal bawk.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan  Pi B. Lalramhlimi leh Pu Lalramdinmawia, hnenah hian lawmpuina 'Memento'  leh pawisafai a hlan  a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL DISTRICT RGSA HNUAIAH VC PATHUM TAN COMPUTER SET SEM A NI
content:
1149/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, June 24, 2026:Vawiin khan DRDO Conference Hall, Khawzawl-ah Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) hnuaiah Khawzawl District chhunga Village Council (VC) pathum—Khawzawl Darngawn, Khualen, leh Tlangpui ten ṭangkai taka an hman turin Computer set sem chhuah a ni a. He Computer set semna hun hi Pu K. Lalhmuakliana, District Local Administration Officer (DLAO), Khawzawl chuan a kaihruai a. Pu K. Zorammuana, Additional Deputy Commissioner (Addl. DC), Khawzawl chuan khuallian niin he programme hi a hmanpui.Khuallian Pu K. Zorammuana chuan thu sawiin, tunlai khawvelah khawtlang hmasawnna tura sawrkar hmalakna lawmawm a tih thu leh ṭha taka hnathawh a nih theihnan technology a pawimawh hle tih a sawi a. VC-te'n VC tharte nen charge inhlan chungchangah VC bungraw neih ang angte kim taka inhlan chhawng zel ṭhin turin a fuih a. Vawiina Computer set sem takte chu VC-ten khawtlang enkawlna leh mipui rawngbawlna kawngah ṭangkai taka hmang ngei turin a chah bawk a ni.He hunah hian Computer dawngtu VC aiawhte leh official pawimawh dangte an tel a, VC aiawh te pawhin lawmthu sawiin he Computer Set thar hian VC Office hnathawh a tihchak ngei an beisei thu an tarlang a ni.

title: Mizoram PHED Officer-te tan ni hnih awh Capacity Building Program buatsaih a ni
content:
1148/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 24th June 2026:Vawiin chawhma khan PHED Officer-te tan ni hnih awh tur Capacity Building Program chu Conference Hall, PHED E-in-C Office, Khatlaah a khuh hawnna neih a ni a. Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Guwahati Branch Office leh Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs (FCS&CA) Department te buatsaih a ni.

Capacity Building Program hi Mizoram PHED hnuaia Senior Executive Engineer leh a chunglam te tana ruahman niin, he program-ah hian mi 20 vel an tel thei a. Thupui (topics) pawimawh thlan bik 12 atangin BIS lama mithiam pahnih – Dr. Anuj Verma (Assistant Professor, RIMT) leh Dr. Murali Mohan (Senior Environmental Scientist, TSPC) ten PowerPoint presentation hmangin zirtirna an pe dawn a ni.

He hun hi Chief Secretary Chairman-na hnuaia Committee pawimawh tak pakhat – ‘State Level Standardisation Committee’ meeting hnuhnung ber a committee thuchhuak bawhzuina kal zel a ni a. BIS Guwahati mi leh sa te chuan hetiang ang Capacity Building Program hi Mizoram Sawrkar Department thlanchhuah bik te hnenah a tahtawla neih zel tum a nih thu sawiin, June 22, 2026 khan PWD Officer-te tan Capacity Building Program hi an lo buatsaih tawh bawk a ni.

Attachment
